---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A short, clear description of the feature you would like.

**Example:** "I want employees to be able to attach a photo when reporting an incident."

---

## Problem It Solves

What problem are you trying to solve, or what is currently frustrating?

**Example:** "Right now I have to send photos separately via Messenger, so the photo and the incident report are not connected."

---

## Proposed Solution

How do you imagine this feature working?

**Example:** "On the incident report form, add an 'Attach Photo' button that lets me pick a photo from my phone's gallery."

---

## Who Would Use This?

- [ ] Admin / Owner
- [ ] Officer
- [ ] Employee
- [ ] All users

---

## Priority / Impact

How important is this to your daily work?

- [ ] 🔴 Critical — I can't do my job without it
- [ ] 🟡 High — It would save me significant time
- [ ] 🟢 Nice to have — It would be a helpful improvement

---

## Alternative Solutions

Have you tried any workarounds? Are there other ways this could be solved?

---

## Additional Context

Any other details, screenshots from other apps, or examples that would help explain the feature.
